title: pavonia repanda
intro: Pavonia repanda, also known as Pavonia odorata, is a flowering plant species in the mallow family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia repanda include relief from various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory properties. Pavonia repanda can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
